mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM asset_info WHERE del_flag = '0'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM monitor_server WHERE del_flag = '0'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM monitor_server WHERE del_flag = '0' AND connection_status = '0'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM monitor_server WHERE del_flag = '0' AND (monitor_status = '1' OR connection_status = '1')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM monitor_alarm WHERE del_flag = '0' AND alarm_status IN ('0', '1')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM asset_flow WHERE del_flag = '0'

SELECT id, server_ip AS serverIp, hostname, alarm_type AS alarmType, alarm_level AS alarmLevel, alarm_value AS alarmValue, alarm_status AS alarmStatus, alarm_message AS alarmMessage, DATE_FORMAT(alarm_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS alarmTime FROM monitor_alarm WHERE del_flag = '0' AND alarm_status IN ('0', '1') ORDER BY alarm_level DESC, alarm_time DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT id, asset_id AS assetId, asset_name AS assetName, asset_code AS assetCode, flow_type AS flowType, operator, DATE_FORMAT(operate_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS operateTime FROM asset_flow WHERE del_flag = '0' ORDER BY operate_time DESC LIMIT 4
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(collect_time, '%H:%i') AS timeLabel, cpu_usage AS cpu, memory_usage AS memory, disk_usage AS disk FROM monitor_data ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 6
SELECT alarm_status AS alarmStatus, COUNT(1) AS total FROM monitor_alarm WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY alarm_status

SELECT ms.id, ms.server_ip AS serverIp, ms.hostname, ms.connection_status AS connectionStatus, ms.monitor_status AS monitorStatus, DATE_FORMAT(ms.last_collect_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS lastCollectTime, COALESCE(alarm_stats.active_alarm_count, 0) AS activeAlarmCount, latest.cpu_usage AS cpuUsage, latest.memory_usage AS memoryUsage, latest.disk_usage AS diskUsage FROM monitor_server ms LEFT JOIN ( SELECT server_id, COUNT(1) AS active_alarm_count FROM monitor_alarm WHERE del_flag = '0' AND alarm_status IN ('0', '1') GROUP BY server_id ) alarm_stats ON alarm_stats.server_id = ms.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT md.server_id, md.cpu_usage, md.memory_usage, md.disk_usage, md.collect_time FROM monitor_data md INNER JOIN ( SELECT server_id, MAX(collect_time) AS collect_time FROM monitor_data GROUP BY server_id ) latest_time ON latest_time.server_id = md.server_id AND latest_time.collect_time = md.collect_time ) latest ON latest.server_id = ms.id WHERE ms.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY COALESCE(alarm_stats.active_alarm_count, 0) DESC, CASE WHEN ms.connection_status = '1' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN ms.monitor_status = '1' THEN 0 WHEN ms.monitor_status = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, ms.last_collect_time ASC LIMIT 5
